channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10581] osd_handler.c:1978:osd_object_release()) LBUG
item.description:
[ 394.702625] LustreError: 13061:0:(osd_handler.c:1978:osd_object_release()) LBUG
[ 394.705323] Pid: 13061, comm: mdt00_012
[ 394.707464]
Call Trace:
[ 394.710658] [<ffffffffa02ee7ee>] libcfs_call_trace+0x4e/0x60 [libcfs]

[ 394.720963] [<ffffffff810a5ac0>] ? kthread+0x0/0xe0
[ 394.720964]
[ 394.720965] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
Hit it on 2.10.3 build 96 for 

SLES12 SP3 Server/Client ldiskfs DNE

MDS console:

[37344.279212] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == racer test 1: racer on clients: onyx-48vm5,onyx-48vm6 DURATION=900 ================================ 03:22:37 (1523355757)
[37399.395093] Lustre: lustre-MDT0002: Client 7252301d-8a7e-b311-b5c7-46a2468e261a (at 10.2.8.228@tcp) reconnecting

Andriy Skulysh (c17819@cray.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31087
Subject: LU-10581 mdd: osd_object_release()) LBUG
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
